_meta.as_of: 2026-07-11: layout from last full Get-Dashboard read (2026-07-10T20:03) + verified changes since. Both user UI edits applied 2026-07-10 evening: 91338944 upgraded to stacked topics_selected × topics_missed (bookmark modified 22:46, name kept as 'Topics missed by completers'), 91100366 description edited. Get-Dashboard on this board remains broken for the MCP (UI unaffected) — refresh this snapshot when it reads again.
_meta.note: Row/cell ids are Mixpanel-internal and change if rows are recreated; report ids (bookmarks) are the stable references.

cells.name: Funnel — formal/short
cells.description: Started → Prioritized → Topic answered → Completed, filtered to tone=formal AND depth=short (register+length pair). One of 4 per-variant funnels.

cells.name: Funnel — formal/deep
cells.description: Started → Prioritized → Topic answered → Completed, filtered to tone=formal AND depth=deep. One of 4 per-variant funnels. Low volume at build time (3 sessions/30d) — expect noise until launch.

cells.name: Funnel — personal/short
cells.description: Started → Prioritized → Topic answered → Completed, filtered to tone=personal AND depth=short. One of 4 per-variant funnels.

cells.name: Funnel — personal/deep
cells.description: Started → Prioritized → Topic answered → Completed, filtered to tone=personal AND depth=deep. One of 4 per-variant funnels.

cells.name: Topic-by-topic survival by topics selected
cells.description: One survival curve per cohort: the breakdown splits sessions by how many topics they selected (total_topics), so each colored segment is its own funnel. READ EACH SEGMENT ONLY UP TO ITS OWN N — steps beyond a cohort's N are structurally zero (a 7-topic session can't answer an 8th topic), not drop-off. Within-cohort full completion is the number to watch (e.g. 9-selected: 70% answer all 9). $overall = the old aggregate view.

cells.html: Q2 — Is the quiz the right length?

cells.name: Topics selected per session
cells.description: Distribution of topics selected (topic_count) per session, from Priorities Submitted events. Numeric-bucketed breakdown so bars are ordered 1→9 by topic count, not by frequency. (1→9 ordering itself is a UI sort setting, saved manually.)

cells.name: Completion rate by topics selected
cells.description: Priorities Submitted → Quiz Completed conversion, bucketed by topic_count (3–5 / 6–8 / 9). Replaces the survivorship-biased 'Selected vs. completed' (which averaged over completers only). Answers the actual length question: do users who select more topics finish less often?

cells.name: Topics missed by completers
cells.description: Stacked: bars = sessions that finished having selected N topics; stacks = how many of those N they skipped (topics_missed). Upgraded via UI 2026-07-10 (MCP writes to this cell fail persistently). Query in report-queries.json.

cells.name: Priority bucket distribution
cells.description: Average Critical / Very Important / Important / Low priority counts per session, from Priorities Submitted events

cells.name: Critical marks by topic
cells.description: Metrics A–I = count of sessions marking each topic's priority as CRITICAL (bucket=4), fixed order: A=Security, B=Economy, C=Housing, D=Education, E=Health, F=Religion, G=Justice, H=Equality, I=Ecology. To be replaced post-deploy by a topic_priority breakdown (real labels).

cells.name: Free-text opener rate by topic
cells.description: % of each topic's opener answers that were free-text (formula: average of the 0/1 Opener Was Free-Text × 100, so 30 = 30%). Note: any extra % badge Mixpanel shows next to a bar is that topic relative to the overall average — not the rate itself.

cells.name: Follow-up depth by topic
cells.description: Average Follow-up Count by Topic and Depth, from Topic Completed events. Values are counts, not %; '% of overall' badges are segment-vs-overall-average display artifacts (description added via UI 2026-07-10).

cells.name: Aspects probed
cells.description: Which follow-up 'aspect' (party-platform dimension) got covered per topic (TOPIC_KEY_DIMENSIONS, lib/questions.ts), from the AI's targetedAspect per follow-up. '(empty list)' = zero aspects covered. Post skip-bug fix (2026-07-10), pair with skipped_follow_up to separate user skips from AI-not-engaging.

cells.name: Follow-up count by depth
cells.description: Average Follow-up Count from Topic Completed events, by Depth

cells.name: Completion by tone
cells.description: 4-step funnel (Quiz Started → Priorities Submitted → Topic Completed → Quiz Completed), breakdown by Tone only

cells.name: Top party distribution
cells.description: Count of Results Viewed events by Top Matched Party

cells.name: Score spread (top 3)
cells.description: score_spread_top3 = (top match score) − (3rd match score). High = clear front-runner; low = muddy top group. score_spread_top2 exists post-2026-07-10 for #1-vs-#2 decisiveness.

cells.name: API errors over time
cells.description: Count of API Error events by API Endpoint and Error Code, trended daily

cells.name: Sessions per day
cells.description: Daily Quiz Started count — volume context for every other number on this board.

cells.name: Completion rate over time
cells.description: Quiz Started → Quiz Completed conversion trended over time (funnel trends view, 3 months) — shows whether shipped fixes move completion.
